## PR Summary / PR摘要

### Change Type / 变更类型
- [ ] 🆕 New entry / 新增条目
- [ ] 🔄 Update existing / 更新现有
- [ ] 🐛 Fix incorrect info / 修复错误
- [ ] 📚 Documentation / 文档改进

### Category / 分类
- [ ] network-security / 网络安全
- [ ] system-vulnerabilities / 系统漏洞
- [ ] system-troubleshooting / 故障排障

### Bilingual Check / 双语检查
- [ ] Chinese content provided / 已提供中文内容
- [ ] English content provided / 已提供英文内容
- [ ] Terms translated consistently / 术语翻译一致

### Source Check / 来源检查
- [ ] References from authoritative sources / 来源权威
- [ ] No sensitive info leaked / 未泄露敏感信息
- [ ] Links are accessible / 链接可访问

---

**License**: By submitting, I agree to license under MIT.
**许可**: 提交即同意在MIT许可下授权。
